findingDetails.claim: Phase 003 makes a family: cli hub identity available before the scorer rewrite that ADR-005 requires to be atomic with the identity change.
findingDetails.counterevidenceSought: A proof that phase-003 hub metadata cannot enter the advisor projection before phase 005, including an intervening graph scan/rebuild case.
findingDetails.alternativeExplanation: The hub metadata may be intended to be inert until phase 006, but the reviewed plans do not encode or verify that isolation.
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: A tested projection-isolation invariant prevents staged hub metadata from affecting the scorer until phase-005 atomic activation.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Direct cross-phase trace from scaffolded family metadata to the scorer's documented family filter and one-commit dissolution requirement.
findingDetails.recommendation: Defer advisor-visible family metadata to phase 005, or enforce and test no-projection/no-rebuild isolation until the phase-005 activation.

omittedHighRiskTargets: Runtime advisor scorer source is outside the declared review target; its intended behavior was assessed only through the scoped ADR/spec contract.

detail: New P1: phase ordering violates the documented family-identity/scorer atomicity invariant.
